title: Employment Law – Protecting Employees and Employers
description: We provide legal assistance to both employees and employers. Dismissals, employment contracts, workplace disputes, harassment, discrimination – Specter & Associates Law Firm, Warsaw.
content:
Employment Law – When Workplace Relations Require Legal Support

Employment law governs the relationship between employees and employers. Violations of employee rights, unlawful dismissals, wage disputes or workplace harassment are situations that require the assistance of a qualified lawyer. Specter & Associates Law Firm in Warsaw represents both employees asserting their rights and employers defending their legitimate business interests.

Legal Assistance for Employees

Employees are often unaware of the full extent of their rights. We assist with matters such as:

  • Unlawful dismissal – if you were dismissed in breach of statutory requirements (no written reasons, dismissal during a period of protected absence, violation of pre-retirement protection), we can pursue reinstatement or compensation on your behalf,
  • Wage claims – recovery of unpaid wages, overtime pay, bonuses and other employment benefits,
  • Employment certificate – rectification of an incorrect employment certificate, claiming damages for the issue of a defective certificate,
  • Disguised employment – establishing the existence of an employment relationship where an employer unlawfully used civil law contracts instead of an employment contract,
  • Workplace accident – claiming compensation and damages from the employer, challenging the accident report.

Legal Assistance for Employers

Employers face ongoing challenges in managing their workforce in compliance with the law. We offer support in:

  • Employment documentation – work regulations, remuneration policies, GDPR compliance frameworks, non-compete agreements and confidentiality agreements,
  • Carrying out dismissals – notice of termination, mutual termination agreements, collective redundancies in compliance with statutory procedures,
  • Representation before the Labour Court – defending employers in claims brought by current or former employees,
  • Employment audit – review of employment documentation for compliance with labour law and remedial recommendations.

Workplace Disputes – Representation Before the Labour Court

The Labour Court is a specialist division of the District Court that resolves employment disputes. Proceedings before the Labour Court have specific procedural rules. Our lawyers have extensive experience representing parties in employment disputes. We handle cases involving:

  • reinstatement to work,
  • compensation for unlawful dismissal,
  • wages and other employment entitlements,
  • establishing the existence of an employment relationship.

Workplace Harassment and Discrimination

Workplace harassment (mobbing) and discrimination cause serious harm to employees. Polish labour law provides protection against these phenomena and allows victims to claim compensation and damages. We help victims of harassment and discrimination to:

  • collect and preserve evidence,
  • file a complaint with the National Labour Inspectorate,
  • bring a claim before the Labour Court,
  • recover the compensation and damages they are entitled to.

Every employment law case is unique – contact us to discuss your situation. The initial meeting is free of charge.
